title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Prarthana and Raunak meet by fate. She marries into a rich family but faces struggles. Prarthana works hard to save her marriage and secure her future, overcoming obstacles with determination.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: After proving her innocence, Raghav takes Reet home. Later, Unnati's truth is revealed to Sharda, who tries to provoke her.

title: Vasudha
desc: Sarika addresses Vasudha's need for a blood transfusion. Later, Karishma initiates a plan of action upon receiving a message while Prabhat contacts Chandrika.

title: Meet
desc: Babita tells Meet she is glad he is leaving home. Meanwhile, Ram and Lakhan orchestrate a plan to bring Sunaina and Tej closer.

title: Meet
desc: Meet shares her feelings with Rajvardhan as he prepares to meet a groom's family. Later, Babita asks Meet if life is possible without her.

title: Bhagya Lakshmi
desc: Malishka reveals Rishi's conviction about Lakshmi's role in Neelam's death to Anushka. Further, this belief creates a roadblock for Aayush and Shalu's potential marriage.

title: Bhagya Lakshmi
desc: Rano storms in, furious about Lakshmi and Shalu's mistreatment. Later, Shalu arrives to confront Aayush, only to be met with an unexpectedly cold response.

title: Jodha Akbar
desc: Jalal accuses Jodha of being unfaithful while Adham tries to assassinate Pir Mohammad. Later, the Emperor punishes Aziza for seeing an old flame, which Jodha boldly protests.

title: Jodha Akbar
desc: During the 16th century, Emperor Akbar secures a crucial alliance through his marriage to Jodha, a princess from the esteemed Rajput dynasty.

title: Kundali Bhagya
desc: Pragya Arora's long-lost sisters, Preeta and Srishti, plot their own course in fate's uncharted waters where adversities and good times go hand in hand.
